project_identity.name: CAVI
project_identity.design_philosophy: A premium, high-trust fintech aesthetic. Rejects generic 'tech-bro neon' by grounding the UI in deep, cinematic darkness with sharp, high-contrast data visualization. Information architecture mimics high-end trading terminals.

strategy.purple_usage: CRITICAL: Do not use purple (#6c63ff) for primary Call-to-Action buttons. Use it strictly for ambient glows, active states on subtle elements, and decorative 'Tracing Beam' borders. Avoids the 'purple CTA' anti-pattern.
strategy.green_usage: Use #00d4a0 for primary financial actions (Deposit, Invest), positive ROI numbers, and success states.
strategy.gold_usage: Use #f0a500 for wealth-oriented highlights (e.g., 'Grow Your Wealth' accents, premium tiers, projected ROI numbers).
strategy.red_usage: Use #ff4757 for withdrawals, negative trends, and destructive admin actions.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter leading-none. Never center by default; use left-aligned asymmetric layouts.
rules.data: CRITICAL: All crypto prices, wallet addresses, ROI percentages, and table numerics MUST use JetBrains Mono (tracking-tight) to evoke a 'pro terminal' feel.
rules.overlines: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#6c63ff] or #f0a500.

spacing_and_layout.global: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Tailwind Scale: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-24.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_pages: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Span logic: Hero spanning 8 cols, calculators spanning 4 cols. Assymetry is mandatory.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_and_admin: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, data-heavy. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and headings. Never center unless explicitly necessary for an isolated component.

surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Max overlay opacity bg-[#05080f]/80 to 90%. Must let abstract backgrounds breathe while maintaining APCA text contrast.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant). bg-[#0a0f1a]/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-l border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]. Radius: rounded-xl.
surface_strategies.admin_tables: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). border-collapse, expose the skeleton. border-b border-white/5 on all rows. No soft shadows inside the admin control panel.
surface_strategies.noise_texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise overlay across the global background to kill 'digital flatness'.

buttons.primary_finance: bg-[#00d4a0]/10 text-[#00d4a0] border border-[#00d4a0]/40 hover:bg-[#00d4a0] hover:text-[#05080f] transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase text-sm tracking-wider.
buttons.web3_wallet: bg-[#121a2f] text-white border border-white/10 hover:border-[#6c63ff]/50 hover:bg-[#121a2f]/80 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-md.
buttons.admin_action: bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-sm.

components.inputs: Shadcn highly customized. bg-[#0a0f1a] border-white/10 focus:border-[#6c63ff] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#6c63ff]/50 rounded-sm font-mono placeholder:text-white/20.
components.charts: Recharts. Remove grid lines entirely or use stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.02)'. Use glowing drop-shadows on the line paths. Area charts should use a gradient from #00d4a0 to transparent.
components.toggles: Shadcn Switch. Custom active color: bg-[#00d4a0].

motion_and_interactions.hero: Framer Motion: Staggered text reveal (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_and_interactions.ticker: The 'Editorial Ribbon'. react-fast-marquee. Very slow, smooth drift. JetBrains Mono. Green/Red text depending on ticker symbol.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1). 'Tracing Beam' effect on ROI calculator borders using Framer Motion or gradient masks.

images.description: Dark abstract close-up of illuminated geometric metallic shapes. Apply heavy dark overlay (#05080f/85).
Artistic blend of geometric shapes in purple/blue tones. Use for the 'Supported Networks' section background or auth page split-screen with high blur and heavy dark overlay.

media.icons_strategy: Use react-icons/fa or react-icons/si for Web3 networks (Ethereum, Solana, BNB, Tron). Use lucide-react for standard dashboard actions (wallets, admin, charts).

pages_instructions.landing_page: Hero: 'Grow Your Wealth With CAVI' in Unbounded font, left-aligned, overlapping the hero_background. Live crypto ticker (marquee) separating the hero and next section. ROI Calculator: Neumorphic/Crystal glass card on the right side of the bento grid. Supported Networks: display as tall/square bento items with subtle hover glows.
pages_instructions.auth_pages: Split screen layout. Left: marketing_abstract_1 with glassmorphism quote card. Right: Auth forms. Connect Wallet buttons stacked above standard Email/Pass fields.
pages_instructions.user_dashboard: Sidebar nav. Wallets Page: 'Generate Address' button reveals string in JetBrains Mono. ROI Page: Large top stat (Today's Rate in Gold/Green), Recharts 30-day area chart below. Empty state uses dashed borders and 'No Deposits Yet'. Withdrawals Page: strict, terminal-like form.
pages_instructions.admin_panel: Dense layout. Header with global stats. 'All Users' table with Shadcn toggles for admin status. 'ROI Control' inputs to manually override rates. Withdrawals management table with Approve/Reject actions in Green/Red.

testing.attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Example: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='roi-calculator-slider'.
